name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】
The diamond quilted pattern, evolved from the 1930s Gucci logo, has become a traditional symbol. This small Ophidia handbag incorporates this high-recognizability pattern. Double G accessories add charm to the look!
Size: 25x/15.5/ 6cm【With original packaging】
￼
